sections.name: Anvaca
sections.text: *Nethys Note: No description has been provided for this NPC.*

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Tiny
traits.text: *Space:* Less than 5 feet, *Reach (Tall):* 0 feet, *Reach (Long):* 0 feet.  Multiple Tiny creatures can occupy the same square.  At least four can fit in a single square, though the GM might determine that even more can fit.  Tiny creatures can occupy a space larger creature as well, and if their reach is 0 feet, they must do so in order to attack.

traits.name: Construct
traits.text: A construct is an artificial creature empowered by a force other than vitality or void.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

traits.name: Poppet
traits.text: Small constructs originally designed to serve as companions or servants. They occasionally gain a greater spark of life, transforming them into independent, sapient creatures.

sources.name: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

link.name: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun pg. 53
link.alt: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun pg. 53

automatic_abilities.name: Constructed
automatic_abilities.text: Anvaca gains a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against death effects, disease, and poison, as well as to saving throws against effects that would give them the drained, paralyzed, or sickened conditions. They count as a living creature (and can therefore be healed by vitality and harmed by void damage).

universal_monster_ability.name: Shield Block
universal_monster_ability.trigger: The monster has its shield raised and takes damage from a physical attack
universal_monster_ability.effect: The monster snaps its shield into place to deflect a blow. The shield prevents the monster from taking an amount of damage up to the shield's Hardness. The monster and the shield each take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the shield.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

traits.name: Mounted
traits.text: Mounted siege weapons take up a certain size and space, and typically have statistics to allow them to be attacked. They're used for large-scale warfare.

traits.name: Range
traits.text: These attacks will either list a finite range or a range increment, which follows the normal rules for range increments.

ability.name: Dead, But Not Forgotten

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Spirit
traits.text: Effects with this trait can affect creatures with spiritual essence and might deal spirit damage. A creature with this trait is defined by its spiritual essence. Spirit creatures often lack a material form.

ability.text: The countless ghostly echoes that compose Anvaca's spirit surround the poppet's body, then surge out in either a 15-foot emanation or a 60-foot line, dealing 6d10 spirit damage to all creatures in the area (DC 28 basic Reflex). Anvaca can't use Dead, But Not Forgotten again for 1d4 rounds.

ability.name: Moon-Blessed Hoplite
ability.text: Anvaca can wield a longspear in one hand if they're holding a shield in their other hand. Spear weapons Anvaca wields temporarily become *+2 greater striking* and deal an additional 1d8 spirit damage on a hit.

ability.name: Shielded Approach
ability.text: Anvaca Raises their Shield, then either Strides or Steps
